on

Twenty players are now in the Super Falcons camp in Doula, Cameroon, ahead of Friday’s (today) 2024 Olympic Games qualifying fixture against the Indomitable Lionesses.

Nineteen players travelled to Douala for the game on Wednesday night.

Versatile Sevilla of Spain star, Toni Payne breezed into the team’s camp on Thursday to increase the number.

Payne also took part in the team’s evening training session at the venue of the game, Stade de la Reunification, Douala.

Forward Uchenna Kanu is the only player still being expected in camp.

Tonight’s encounter will start at 6pm Nigerian time.

The reverse fixture will hold next Monday at the Moshood Abiola Stadium, Abuja.
